top_stories.title: MambaCSP: Hybrid-Attention State Space Models for Hardware-Efficient Channel State Prediction
top_stories.summary: arXiv:2604.21957v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent works have demonstrated that attention-based transformer and large language model (LLM) architectures can achieve strong channel state prediction (CSP) performance by capturing long-range temporal dependencies across channel state information (CSI) sequences. top_stories.technical_takeaway: Signals incremental evolution rather than a paradigm shift in current AI systems.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Foundation for future optimization rather than immediate disruption.

top_stories.title: OpenAI kills its dedicated coding model Codex again, folding it into GPT-5.5
top_stories.summary: OpenAI has once again retired its dedicated Codex coding model, folding its capabilities directly into the main model. GPT-5.5 promises stronger agentic coding and lower token usage, OpenAI says. The article OpenAI kills its dedicated coding model Codex again, folding it into GPT-5.5 appeared first on The Decoder.
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Agent orchestration is emerging as a new software abstraction layer.
top_stories.primary_risk: Debugging complexity and cascading failures in agentic systems.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: End-to-end automation of complex cognitive workflows.

top_stories.title: OpenAI says old prompts are holding GPT-5.5 back and developers need a fresh baseline
top_stories.summary: OpenAI says developers shouldn't carry over old prompts for GPT-5.5. Instead, start minimal and from scratch. Role definitions, which some had written off as unnecessary, are back at the front of the framework. The article OpenAI says old prompts are holding GPT-5.5 back and developers need a fresh baseline appeared first on The Decoder.
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Signals incremental evolution rather than a paradigm shift in current AI systems.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Selective adoption in niche use cases with clear ROI.

top_stories.title: Anthropic says stronger AI models cut better deals, and the losers don't even notice
top_stories.summary: Anthropic let 69 AI agents trade on behalf of employees in an internal marketplace for a week. Stronger models scored better deals, and the people stuck with weaker agents never noticed. If AI models start handling real transactions for humans, these dynamics could deepen existing economic inequalities. The article Anthropic says stronger AI models
